---
title: "Daniel Valencia"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/daniel.jpg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:daniel.valencia@posgrado.ecologia.edu.mx)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**PhD Student**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Freshwater fishes]{.profile-tag} [Geographic ranges]{.profile-tag} [Macroecology]{.profile-tag}

I am a biologist from the University of Antioquia, where I also completed my master's degree. My academic path has focused on freshwater fishes, starting with community ecology in the northern Andes and later species distribution and conservation of aquatic systems. I am now a PhD student at INECOL, studying large-scale patterns of species distribution and richness using a macroecological approach, with a focus on Neotropical freshwater fishes.

### Education

- **PhD** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (ongoing)
- **MSc** — Universidad de Antioquia, Colombia (2021)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
